experience_probes: time-series forecasting in production (ARIMA, statsmodels) beyond notebooks
climate or public-sector / municipal use cases
scope_probes: scheduled-report migration: independent initiative or assigned?
pair-on monthly model reviews: participating or observing?
senior capstone authorship: solo or team?

notes: Junior candidate. Generation MUST NOT inflate years of experience, invent advanced degrees, or claim deep-learning/MLops tools that aren't in source. Keyword integration should focus on what IS in source (pandas, scikit-learn, prophet, SQL). Clarification questions should probe legitimate-but-undocumented experience (geospatial, statsmodels in production, climate domain) and disambiguate scope on the analyst role.
